<!--
  GENERIC DOC TEMPLATE. Copy into the right folder as DOC-###-<slug>.md (or a fixed
  filename for a singleton doc), then:
    1. Uncomment the frontmatter block (remove the outer <!-- --> wrapper).
    2. Pick the right `type` from README-DOCS.md. Assign the next DOC-### id.
    3. Delete these comments.

  Use this for anything that is not a PRD or ADR: a guide, a spec, a reference.
-->

<!--
---
id: DOC-###
type:                  # guide | tech-spec | api-docs | testing | glossary | ...
status: draft          # draft | active | locked | done | deprecated
phase: null
owner: james
tags: []               # controlled vocabulary only — see README-DOCS.md
links: []
updated: YYYY-MM-DD
---
-->

     not the filename. -->
